titleStmt.title: SII 25.165: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 165. (A.R. No. 165 of 1908.) TIRUNAṞAIYŪR, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Siddhanāthasvāmi temple.
This inscription commences with the praśasti, Puyalvāyttu-vaḷamperuga, etc., of the king.
The details of the date of the record viz., year 5, Vṛiśchika, śu 3, Saturday, Uttirāḍam may be equated with 24th November 1150 A.D. However, the weekday was Friday.

It records the gift of 200 kāśu for maintaining a perpetual lamp to the deity Siddhēśvaram-uḍaiyār at Tirunaṟaiyūr in Tirunaṟaiyūr-nāḍu in Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-vaḷanādu by Viḻupparayaṟ Madurāntakan of Maṇṇaikkudi in Maṇṇaikkuḍi-nāḍu. The poliyūṭṭu amount specified above was received by the Śivabrāhmaṉas, who had the right of worship for a cycle of 30 days in this temple, undertook to supply one uḻakku of oil daily to maintain the gift. The names of the Śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple are mentioned in the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . puyalvāyttu vaḷamperukap poyyāta nāṉmaṟaiyiṉ ceyalvāyppa tirumakaḷuñ ceyamakaḷuñ ciṟantu vāḻa veṇmati poṟkuṭai viḷaṅka velventaraṭi vaṇaṅka
maṇmaṭantai manaṅkaḷippa manunititaḻaittoṅkac cakkaramuñ ceṅkoluṉ tikkaṉaittuñ celanaṭappa kaṟpakālam puvikākkap poṟpamainta muṭipuṉaintu cempon virasi
ṅhāsanattu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecaripaṟmarāna rājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 5 Āvatu nāḷ vṛścikanāyaṟṟup pūrvvapakṣattu tritiyaiyum canikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirāṭat
tu nāḷ kulottuṅka coḻavaḷanāṭṭut tirunaṟaiyūrnāṭṭu tirunaṟaiyūruṭaiyār cittiśśvaramuṭaiyārkku maṇṇaikkuṭi nāṭṭu maṇṇaikkuṭi viḻupparayaṟ maturāntakan tiruna
n yātavarāyan candrādittavarai cella vaitta tirunantāviḷa
k konṟukku Upayamāka Ivviḷakkerikka Ikkoyil muppatu va
ṭṭattu kāṇiuṭaiya civa[ brāhmaṇan] kāśyapan piramiciramuṭaiyān Āḷk
koṇṭanāyakap pāratāyan maturāntaka tevan
ca paṭṭanum Āttirayaṉ tiruvāḷaṉ Irā[ja*]rā[ja*]paṭṭanum Ā
nampitillaiyāḷi paṭṭanum Āttirayan virumpiyatiruvaṭināṟpa
tteṇṇāyira Āttirayaṉ cuvaṉtavaḷināyakaṉ citti
śvaramuṭaiyāṉum Āttirayaṉ mātevaṉ Eḻunūṟṟuvapaṭṭanu
m Āttiraiyaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ tevāṇṭāṉ
paṭṭaṉum vaṉum gautaman comatevaṉ A ba
va paṭṭanum Āttirayaṉ Āmpal niṟaintār tiruvalañcu
ḻi Uṭaiyāṉum Ivvaṉaivom Upayaṅkoṇṭa paricāvatu
kku tirunantāviḷakku Oṉṟukku nāḷ Oṉ
ṟukku Eṇṇai vaḻakkāka vaṉta Eṇṇai cantirātitya
varai celuttakkaṭavatāka Ivar pakkal poṉ
koṇṭu poliyūṭṭāka nāṅkaḷ kaikkoṇṭa
kācu Irunūṟu Ikkācu Irunūṟṟukkum tirunaṉtāviḷakku
candrādittavarai cella Erikka kaṭavatāka nāṅkaḷ kāṇi O
pātikkup poṉ koṇṭu poliūṭṭāka kaikkoṇṭa
maiyil Ikkoyil civapirāmaṇarkaḷ pala paṭṭar
koṇṭu muṟai ceyvār nāḷopāti Upayañ celuttaContinuation not traceable.
Digital edition of SII 25.165 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
